name: Maui Onion Relish
recipeInstructions:
1. Using a food processor, coarsely chop the onions and peppers. Process only two at a time to avoid turning them into paste.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large, heavy stockpot.
3. Cook over medium heat until the onions begin to become translucent, about 15 minutes.
4. Prepare 8 half-pint jars according to manufacturer's instructions.
5. Spoon the relish into the jars, filling to 1/2 inch from the rim.
6. Clean the rims and seal the jars according to manufacturer's instructions.
7. Process sealed jars in boiling water for 10 minutes.
